'''nazhushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qlippot|qlippot]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-zh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qlippot|qlippot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nazhushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:næzhishith|næzhishith]] || [[word:næzhishij|næzhishij]] || [[word:næzhishish|næzhishish]] || [[word:næzhishi|næzhishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nazhuzhushuth|nazhuzhushuth]] || [[word:nazhuzhushuj|nazhuzhushuj]] || [[word:nazhuzhushush|nazhuzhushush]] || [[word:nazhuzhushu|nazhuzhushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nazhushuth|nazhushuth]] || [[word:nazhushuj|nazhushuj]] || [[word:nazhushush|nazhushush]] || [[word:nazhushu|nazhushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nazhufshuth|nazhufshuth]] || [[word:nazhufshuj|nazhufshuj]] || [[word:nazhufshush|nazhufshush]] || [[word:nazhufshuf|nazhufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nazhushuthu|nazhushuthu]] || [[word:nazhushuju|nazhushuju]] || [[word:nazhushushu|nazhushushu]] || [[word:nazhushuku|nazhushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nazhushuth|nazhushuth]] || [[word:nazhushuj|nazhushuj]] || [[word:nazhushush|nazhushush]] || [[word:nazhushu|nazhushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nazhushuthul|nazhushuthul]] || [[word:nazhushujul|nazhushujul]] || [[word:nazhushushul|nazhushushul]] || [[word:nazhushukul|nazhushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nazhushuthuthu|nazhushuthuthu]] || [[word:nazhushujuju|nazhushujuju]] || [[word:nazhushushushu|nazhushushushu]] || [[word:nazhushuku|nazhushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nazhushuthun|nazhushuthun]] || [[word:nazhushujun|nazhushujun]] || [[word:nazhushushun|nazhushushun]] || [[word:nazhushukun|nazhushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nazhushuthuoro|nazhushuthuoro]] || [[word:nazhushujuoro|nazhushujuoro]] || [[word:nazhushushuoro|nazhushushuoro]] || [[word:nazhushukuoro|nazhushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
